name: Spicy Mexican Pickled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Carrots, scraped and thinly sliced
1/2 can Whole pickled jalapenos, drained (7 oz. can)
7 oz Pickled baby corn on cob, drained (1 jar)
6 oz Can pitted small ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, sauté garlic and onion in hot oil for 3 minutes.
2. Add carrots and peppercorns; sauté another 5 minutes.
3. Stir in vinegar; cover the pot, reduce heat, and simmer for 3 minutes.
4. Add water and jalapenos; cover and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Stir in cauliflower and salt; cover, reduce heat to medium, and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add zucchini, bay leaves, marjoram, oregano, and thyme; stir well and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in corn and olives.
8. Transfer the mixture to a large container, cover tightly, and chill for at least 8 hours.
9. Before serving, discard the bay leaves.
